description: CLI interface for Shop Salvation Army

auth.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy auth` to access this command group. Run `--help` on a subcommand for details.

login.help: Configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent.
login.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy auth login` with the documented arguments and options shown below.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to save credentials to

logout.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy auth logout` with the documented arguments and options shown below.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to clear credentials from

profiles.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy auth profiles` to access this command group. Run `--help` on a subcommand for details.

create.help: Create a new profile from .env.example template.
create.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy auth profiles create` with the documented arguments and options shown below.

delete.help: Delete a profile and its data.
delete.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy auth profiles delete` with the documented arguments and options shown below.

get.help: Get details for a specific profile.
get.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy auth profiles get` with the documented arguments and options shown below.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to get details for

list.help: List all profiles and show which is the default.
list.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy auth profiles list` with the documented arguments and options shown below.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of profiles to return

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include

remove.help: Delete a profile and its data.

select.help: Activate a profile within its auth type.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to activate within its auth type

status.help: Check authentication status across profiles. Performs a live round-trip for every configured credential type so the report reflects ground truth — not on-disk belief. Saved credentials whose live verification fails are reported as ``authenticated: false`` with the failure reason in ``api_test``.
status.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy auth status` with the documented arguments and options shown below.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles)

test.help: Test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles.
test.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy auth test` with the documented arguments and options shown below.

cache.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy cache` to access this command group. Run `--help` on a subcommand for details.

clear.help: Remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.
clear.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy cache clear` with the documented arguments and options shown below.

search.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy search` to access this command group. Run `--help` on a subcommand for details.

categories.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy search categories` with the documented arguments and options shown below.

get.help: Get details for a specific item.
get.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy search get` to fetch details for a specific listing. JSON output includes `available` (bool: true if the item is still purchasable — computed from auction_status and buy_it_now_price), `auction_status` (active or ended), `buy_it_now_price` (float or null; 0.0 means no BIN), and `current_price`. Always check `available` before recording a listing; skip if false.

query.help: Search for items on Shop The Salvation Army.
query.usage_instructions: Use `shopsalvationarmy search query` with the documented arguments and options shown below.

arguments.name: query
arguments.help: Search keywords (leave empty for all items)

options.name: --sort
options.help: Sort by: ending, newest, oldest, price_low, price_high

options.name: --status
options.help: Listing status: active, completed, or any

usage_instructions: Use `` with the documented arguments and options shown below.
